flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Cincinnati-Main Campus rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.6k → $14.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Cincinnati-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Cincinnati-Main Campus rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (38.1% → 42.2%).
